\tzpentry{ID3337}{Entanglement Action Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3337 introduces Entanglement Action Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S_{ \text{entanglement}} = - \text{Tr}[ \rho_A \log_2 \rho_A] = - \sum_i \lambda_i \log_2 \lambda_i \end{equation}
